description: NYC Yellow Taxi trip records. Each row is one trip with timestamps, TLC zone IDs, distance, payment type, and fare components. January 2025 data (~3.5M trips).

columns.name: vendorid
columns.description: TPEP provider: 1=Creative Mobile Technologies, 2=Curb Mobility, 6=Myle, 7=Helix.

columns.name: tpep_pickup_datetime
columns.description: Timestamp when the taximeter was engaged (trip start).

columns.name: tpep_dropoff_datetime
columns.description: Timestamp when the taximeter was disengaged (trip end).

columns.name: passenger_count
columns.description: Number of passengers in the vehicle.

columns.name: trip_distance
columns.description: Trip distance in miles as reported by the taximeter.

columns.name: ratecodeid
columns.description: Final rate code: 1=Standard, 2=JFK, 3=Newark, 4=Nassau/Westchester, 5=Negotiated, 6=Group, 99=Unknown.

columns.name: store_and_fwd_flag
columns.description: Y if trip was stored in vehicle memory before upload; N otherwise.

columns.name: pulocationid
columns.description: TLC taxi zone ID where the meter was engaged (pickup).

columns.name: dolocationid
columns.description: TLC taxi zone ID where the meter was disengaged (dropoff).

columns.name: payment_type
columns.description: Payment method: 1=Credit card, 2=Cash, 3=No charge, 4=Dispute, 5=Unknown, 6=Voided.

columns.name: fare_amount
columns.description: Time-and-distance fare calculated by the meter (USD).

columns.name: extra
columns.description: Miscellaneous extras and surcharges (USD).

columns.name: mta_tax
columns.description: MTA tax triggered by the metered rate (USD).

columns.name: tip_amount
columns.description: Tip amount; auto-populated for card tips, excludes cash tips.

columns.name: tolls_amount
columns.description: Total tolls paid during the trip (USD).

columns.name: improvement_surcharge
columns.description: Improvement surcharge at flag drop, levied since 2015 (USD).

columns.name: total_amount
columns.description: Total charged to passenger; excludes cash tips (USD).

columns.name: congestion_surcharge
columns.description: NYS congestion surcharge collected on the trip (USD).

columns.name: airport_fee
columns.description: Airport pickup fee for LaGuardia and JFK (USD).

columns.name: cbd_congestion_fee
columns.description: MTA Congestion Relief Zone fee (from Jan 2025) (USD).
